description: Create a Wardley Map for an online marketplace platform based on the strategy document provided at ~/Desktop/marketplace_strategy.txt. The diagram must include a map titled 'Online Marketplace Platform — Wardley Map' with the X-axis labeled with evolution stages ('Genesis', 'Custom Built', 'Product (+rental)', 'Commodity (+utility)') and the Y-axis labeled from 'Visible' to 'Invisible'. Map all 18 components and their relationships according to the value chain visibility, evolution stages, and dependencies defined in the strategy file. Include a second page in the diagram named 'Strategic Moves' that lists the 3 strategic recommendations found in the document. Save the diagram to ~/Desktop/marketplace_wardley_map.drawio and export the map page as a PNG to ~/Desktop/marketplace_wardley_map.png.
